ModMetaData.name: All Traders Arrive by Airship
ModMetaData.author: wishRobber
ModMetaData.description:
Every trader arrives by airship. Medieval Trader Airships brings orbital traders down as landing airships, but faction trade caravans still walk in on foot with pack animals - so this companion patch finishes the job: when a faction would send a trade caravan, an airship descends instead, stocked with that faction's own caravan goods. Together, every merchant that visits your medieval colony now arrives by air.
You trade with the landed airship exactly like an orbital one - no comms console or trade beacon needed. It reuses Medieval Trader Airships' own ship, so it fits right in; if that mod isn't loaded this quietly does nothing and normal walking caravans return.
Requires Medieval Trader Airships (and Harmony). The airship is a trade ship, so there are no escort pawns or other walking-caravan extras. A pure compatibility patch - no new items or defs - and safe to add to or remove from a save at any time. A clean immersion upgrade for any medieval or fantasy RimWorld playthrough.
